import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from freezegun import freeze_time
from myapp.orders import OrderService

@pytest.fixture
def order_service():
    return OrderService()

@freeze_time("2025-06-15 10:30:00")
def test_order_has_timestamp(order_service):
    order = order_service.create({"item": "widget", "qty": 2})
    assert order["created_at"] is not None
    assert order["created_at"] == datetime(2025, 6, 15, 10, 30, 0)

@freeze_time("2025-06-15 10:30:00")
def test_invoice_date_is_today(order_service):
    order = order_service.create({"item": "gadget", "qty": 1})
    invoice = order_service.generate_invoice(order["id"])
    assert invoice["date"] == "2025-06-15"

@freeze_time("2025-06-15 10:30:00")
def test_session_expiry(order_service):
    session = order_service.start_session()
    expected = datetime(2025, 6, 15, 11, 30, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
    assert session["expires_at"] == expected

@freeze_time("2025-06-15 10:30:00")
def test_report_period(order_service):
    report = order_service.monthly_report()
    assert report["period"] == "2025-06"
